results.name: panic_assertion_failed
results.rationale: Builds Arguments::new_const(&[msg]) on the stack and tail-calls the 2-arg panic_fmt-with-location helper; signer-supplied (msg, location) decl preserved.

results.name: panic_index_out_of_bounds
results.rationale: Standard Rust panic_index_out_of_bounds: forwards index and len through format_args! to panic_fmt with the caller's Location.

results.name: core::result::unwrap_failed
results.rationale: Standard core::result::unwrap_failed panic helper; HLIL builds Arguments from msg/error then tail-calls panic_fmt.

results.name: panic_overflow_sub
results.rationale: Standard Rust subtract-overflow panic shim: builds a one-piece core::fmt::Arguments on stack with the literal "attempt to subtract with overflow" and tail-calls core::panicking::panic_fmt; the &'static Location arg is unused.

results.rationale: Margin: |oracle*szi|/divisor by margin_type, two output layouts (ADL=type3 vs isolated).

results.name: compute_user_margin_and_shortfall
results.rationale: Reconstructed: equity unit/qty from account.equity option; loop over positions multiplies size by oracle price to accumulate signed total, abs margin, and abs notional; final total adds account equity; sret-style MarginResult returned.

results.name: compute_account_value_for_direction
results.rationale: Reconstruction modeling cross/isolated branches, b-tree position lookup, margin computation, and final equity-minus-margin write.
